description: Review, improve, implement, and repeatedly verify ccusage-gauge multi-machine collection with real host data copied into Docker.

prompts.rielaPromptTemplate: Coordinate the explicit Codex review, Fable proposal, Codex proposal review, Codex implementation, real host/Docker verification, and final Codex review loop. Preserve unrelated work and finish only when verification and final review accept.
prompts.workerSystemPromptTemplate: Work only in the requested repository. Never print credential or raw usage-event contents. Return concise business JSON with concrete files, findings, changes, commands, and evidence.

steps.description: Codex performs a read-only adversarial review of the current branch and existing verification evidence.
Fable creates or revises a remediation and verification proposal from the latest Codex findings.
Codex reviews the Fable proposal for correctness, scope, and testability.
Codex implements the accepted proposal without committing or pushing.
Codex runs code checks and real host/Docker ccusage comparison with secret-safe handling.
Codex reviews the implementation and verification evidence and decides whether another loop is required.
Publish the accepted implementation and verification result.
